creator: m.atkinson@f5.com
text:
camcontrol negotiate causes a recursed on non-recursive mutex panic in xpt.

amd64 GENERIC kernel.

ciss0@pci0:70:0:0:      class=0x010400 card=0x3234103c chip=0x3230103c rev=0x04 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Hewlett-Packard Company'
    device     = 'Smart Array P400 Controller (Smart Array P400 Controller)'
    class      = mass storage
    subclass   = RAID


# camcontrol devlist
<COMPAQ RAID 1  VOLUME OK>         at scbus0 target 0 lun 0 (pass0,da0)
# camcontrol negotiate 0:0:0 -v
panic: _mtx_lock_sleep: recursed on non-recursive mutex XPT topology lock @ /usr/src/sys/cam/cam_xpt.c:4814

cpuid = 0
KDB: enter: panic
[ thread pid 26183 tid 100161 ]
Stopped at      kdb_enter+0x3d: movq    $0,0x6d03c0(%rip)
db> bt
Tracing pid 26183 tid 100161 td 0xffffff0048c98b70
kdb_enter() at kdb_enter+0x3d
panic() at panic+0x17b
_mtx_lock_sleep() at _mtx_lock_sleep+0x151
_mtx_lock_flags() at _mtx_lock_flags+0xe1
xptpdperiphtraverse() at xptpdperiphtraverse+0x1c
xptpdrvtraverse() at xptpdrvtraverse+0x43
xpt_action_default() at xpt_action_default+0xbf7
xptioctl() at xptioctl+0x633
devfs_ioctl_f() at devfs_ioctl_f+0x76
kern_ioctl() at kern_ioctl+0xc5
ioctl() at ioctl+0xef
syscallenter() at syscallenter+0xef
syscall() at syscall+0x4c
Xfast_syscall() at Xfast_syscall+0xe1
--- syscall (54, FreeBSD ELF64, ioctl), rip = 0x800a7976c, rsp = 0x7fffffffd978, rbp = 0x3 ---

How-To-Repeat: camcontrol negotiate on a ciss device.
